name: Desert Commander
description:
Desert Commander is a real-time strategy game set in a desolate, arid landscape. The player takes on the role of a commander tasked with establishing and defending a base while simultaneously gathering resources and eliminating enemy forces. The core gameplay loop revolves around resource management, base building, unit production, and tactical combat. 

The game features a map divided into hexagonal tiles, each representing different types of terrain, such as sand dunes, rocky outcrops, and oases. Resources, primarily water and fuel, are scattered across the map and must be harvested to sustain the player's war effort. Base building involves constructing various structures, including resource refineries, power generators, barracks, vehicle factories, and defensive turrets. 

Unit production allows the player to create a diverse army consisting of infantry, light vehicles, heavy tanks, and air units, each with unique strengths and weaknesses. Tactical combat involves maneuvering units across the battlefield, utilizing terrain to their advantage, and employing different combat tactics to overcome enemy forces. The game features a fog of war, limiting the player's visibility and requiring the use of scout units to gather intelligence on enemy positions and movements. The ultimate goal is to eliminate the enemy base and secure control of the desert region.

The game features multiple factions with different units and special abilities, adding depth and replayability. There are also different game modes such as campaign mode, skirmish mode and multiplayer mode.

controls.a: Attack move - Units move to the target location and automatically attack any enemies they encounter.
controls.d: Defensive Stance - Selected units prioritize defending their current location.
controls.space: Center the camera on the player's main base.
controls.shift: Queue multiple build orders or unit production.
controls.q: Rotate selected building or structure counter-clockwise.
controls.e: Rotate selected building or structure clockwise.
controls.z: Activate special ability of the selected unit (if applicable).
controls.c: Cycle through available production structures (e.g., Barracks, Vehicle Factory).
